## Summary

- What changed?
- Why is this needed?

## Checklist

- [ ] I removed secrets, tokens, cookies, and private data
- [ ] I updated `README.md` if top-level skills changed
- [ ] I added or updated `SKILL.md` for the affected skill
- [ ] I included only sanitized examples and reusable resources
- [ ] I checked whether `.gitignore` needs updates
